report.summary: Audited 2 new learn pages (ZK Coprocessors, ERC-7683), fixed critical StructuredData prop bug and server-component-incompatible event handlers on ERC-7683 page, created branded OG images for both pages.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed ERC-7683 StructuredData prop: changed 'schema' to 'data' — structured data (Article + FAQ JSON-LD) was not rendering due to wrong prop name

Replaced 12 inline event handlers (onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave/onFocus/onBlur) on ERC-7683 page with CSS classes — these handlers are incompatible with Next.js server components and would cause hydration errors or silent failures
Added CSS hover/focus styles via <style> tag: .erc-toc-link (ToC underline on hover, indigo focus ring) and .erc-related-card (border color + bg change on hover)
ZK Coprocessors page audited — no UX issues found; proper Tailwind classes, responsive grid, accessible ToC with hover:underline, correct StructuredData 'data' prop

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: zk-coprocessors-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark branded background, gradient title, ZK circuit visualization, featured project chips (Axiom, Brevis, Herodotus, RISC Zero, Succinct), degen0x logo

OG image: erc-7683-cross-chain-intents-guide (1200x630 SVG) — dark branded background, blue gradient title, cross-chain intent flow diagram (Ethereum→Intent→Base with Filler), 3-step process chips (Declare Intent → Fillers Compete → Settled Cross-Chain), degen0x logo

sections.title: Code Changes
items: src/app/learn/erc-7683-cross-chain-intents-guide/page.tsx — Fixed StructuredData prop, replaced all inline event handlers with CSS classes, added scoped <style> block
